pi_items.source: Task description (line 5) specifies Description: 'Remote consultation service orders' which contains both required keywords

Task description (line 5) specifies Care Setting Type: 'Outpatient'. OpenMRS documentation confirms OUTPATIENT as one of three standard care setting types (INPATIENT, OUTPATIENT, EMERGENCY) per https://guide.openmrs.org/configuration/configuring-visits/

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a new Bahmni/OpenMRS care setting with name 'Telemedicine', description containing keywords 'Remote' and 'consultation' (specifically 'Remote consultation service orders'), and type OUTPATIENT. Admin access uses default Bahmni Lite credentials: username 'superman' with password 'Admin123'. The environment uses a local HTTPS-based Bahmni instance (https://localhost) with self-signed certificates. The task operates on synthetic data: 20 synthetically generated patients with diverse demographics created via the seed_bahmni.py script. All three metadata values have been independently verified against task specifications and OpenMRS documentation.
